title: Senior Doctor - Lupin - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Lupin - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Lupin has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lupin:
Lupin is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin!
